Title: Sa Dec Ornamental Flower Tourist Area
Note:
Sa Dec Flower Village - really popular and eye catching during spring especially before Lunar New Years. Sa Dec historically been known for supplying the country or most of the south with flowers for holidays and big occasions 
If you’re a plant enthusiast, you can see some rare houseplants grown at a lot more affordable prices here
